title: WeaponMod
description: Tired of the old 2D weapons in Minecraft? Here's a new solution! This mod offers new weapons that will add variety to your Minecraft experience. For example, have you ever thought that you could kill terrifying creepers with a water bottle?
body:
**To make the mod work, you need to install Mcreator link**


Tired of the old 2D weapons in Minecraft? Here's a new solution! This mod offers new weapons that will add variety to your Minecraft experience. For example, have you ever thought that you could kill terrifying creepers with a water bottle? 
Or, with the help of emerald claws, you can gain temporary strength! If you don't like it, you can also use a staff to launch magical orbs at your opponents!
